articles.title: Former quick Geoff Allott named New Zealand Cricket chief executive
articles.description: Allott played 10 Tests and 31 ODIs for New Zealand but has also served as NZC's general manager of cricket and an NZC board director, taking over after the resignation of Scott Weenink

articles.title: Wolvaardt soars before T20 WC, but SA search for support cast
articles.description: Happy with her form, the T20I captain says bigger partnerships and better catching would elevate the team further during upcoming global tournament

articles.title: MI sign Maharaj as replacement for injured Santner
articles.description: Santner hurt his shoulder in the field against Chennai Super Kings

articles.title: Former Zimbabwe captain Mary-Anne Musonda retires from all forms of cricket
articles.description: She was part of the Zimbabwe setup since 2006 and was appointed captain in 2018

articles.title: Ankle injury forces Cameron Steel to retire from professional cricket
articles.description: Allrounder calls time on 11-year career following medical advice

articles.title: Devonshire, Patel, McLeod and Sharp named for NZ to face England in ODIs
articles.description: Quartet included in their first overseas ODI squad which will be Suzie Bates farewell to ODI cricket

articles.title: Tanzid Hasan, Amite Hasan earn maiden call-ups to Bangladesh Test squad
articles.description: Bangladesh have also recalled Taskin Ahmed, while Khaled Ahmed and Jaker Ali are notable omissions

articles.title: Deepti's maiden T20I five-for downs South Africa
articles.description: India's 14-run victory leaves the scoreline 3-1 with a match to play, and has asked questions of the hosts' depth

articles.title: Ngidi 'stable' after being taken to hospital for head injury
articles.description: DC fast bowler hit his head hard on the ground while attempting to take a catch

articles.title: 'Everything has to come to an end': Samit Patel bows out of English cricket after 24 years
articles.description: Spinning allrounder reflects on formidable career, as he targets future role as coach ... and maybe selector

articles.title: Shammi Silva set to step down as Sri Lanka Cricket president amid government-led transition
articles.description: Silva, who has been at the top position since 2019, is likely to vacate the position following an executive committee meeting.

articles.title: Tom Abell extends contract with Somerset till 2028
articles.description: The 32-year-old all-rounder made his debut for the club in 2026.
